parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH b AS (
    SELECT o.user_id,
      COUNT(*) as orders,
      SUM(o.total_amount)/100.0 as ltv,
      (NOW()::date - MAX(o.created_at)::date) as silent,
      MAX(o.created_at)::date as last_dt
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.user_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
    GROUP BY o.user_id
  ),
  fav_brand AS (
    SELECT o.user_id, p.brand,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as rn
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON o.id=oi.order_id
    JOIN products p ON p.id=oi.product_id
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web' AND p.brand IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY o.user_id, p.brand
  ),
  fav_sku AS (
    SELECT o.user_id, COALESCE(p.ticker, p.slug) as sku, p.name,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as rn
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON o.id=oi.order_id
    JOIN products p ON p.id=oi.product_id
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web'
    GROUP BY o.user_id, p.ticker, p.slug, p.name
  )
  SELECT 
    b.user_id::text as uid,
    u.email, u.phone, u.telegram_id::text as tg_id,
    u.display_name, u.language,
    b.orders, ROUND(b.ltv::numeric) as ltv_eur,
    b.silent as days_silent, b.last_dt,
    fb.brand as fav_brand,
    fs.sku as fav_sku, fs.name as fav_name
  FROM b
  JOIN users u ON u.id = b.user_id
  LEFT JOIN fav_brand fb ON fb.user_id = b.user_id AND fb.rn = 1
  LEFT JOIN fav_sku fs ON fs.user_id = b.user_id AND fs.rn = 1
  WHERE b.ltv >= 200
    AND b.silent BETWEEN 30 AND 60
    AND b.orders >= 3
    AND u.is_banned = false
  ORDER BY b.ltv DESC
  LIMIT 50
) t
